title: Tender Smoky Norwegian Steak Skewers
description: A cultured Norwegian dish featuring skirty steak, smoke-hot flavors, and ayurvedic-sattvic friendly ingredients, perfect for a monsoon evening
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, coconut oil, ginger paste, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper
Add the skirt steak pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the marinated steak pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the steak reaches an internal temperature of 135 degrees Fahrenheit
Brush the skewers with lemon juice during the last minute of cooking
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot
